problem id: d40ce15d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01011011 -> 01100111
  01101100 -> 10111101
  11100011 -> 10010000
  10011100 -> 01100011
  10111100 -> 11100111
  01110111 -> 11010010
  11010011 -> 01010110
  11111100 -> 11101111
  10001010 -> 00111001

query: 00000100
predicted answer: 00010000
